extortion.description: Bohlsen Restaurant Group is a family-based organization. Michael and Kurt Bohlsen, third generation restaurateurs, uphold the family tradition of mixing the essential ingredients to any successful restaurant enterprise - service, style and cuisine. By focusing on quality, we hope to inspire today's discerning diners and generations of future diners at a Bohlsen Restaurant. We believe that you should have a great dining experience and have fun along the way. We have a strong sense of community, and we aim to enrich the lives of both those who choose to dine with us as well as our valued and loyal staff.
